details.test: Task 1: Nearest 24/7 station with car wash within 10 miles of 94105 and view details
Task 2: Choose $0 annual fee fuel card with >=3% rebate and start application
Task 3: Request monthly bulk diesel quote for 5,000 gallons in Dallas, TX
Task 4: Compare regular gasoline prices at two stations and open directions to cheaper one
Task 5: Enroll in loyalty program with digital-only card and email+SMS notifications
Task 6: Plan EV-friendly trip from Los Angeles to Las Vegas and add up to 3 stations with EV + restaurant
Task 7: Find Station Manager job near Denver (last 30 days) and start application
Task 8: Locate Safety Data Sheet for Premium Unleaded 93 and email it to user
Task 9: Estimate CO savings for 50-vehicle fleet with 40% using biofuel
